ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: PARENT UPDATE RESTRICT
PARENT UPDATE CASCADE
PARENT UPDATE SET NULL
PARENT DELETE RESTRICT
PARENT DELETE CASCADE
PARENT DELETE SET NULL
CHILD INSERT RESTRICT
CHILD INSERT CASCADE
CHILD INSERT SET NULL
CHILD UPDATE RESTRICT
CHILD UPDATE CASCADE
CHILD UPDATE SET NULL
CHILD DELETE RESTRICT
CHILD DELETE CASCADE
PARENT INSERT RESTRICT
UPDATE HEADER
ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Template_Code: %TeradataCreateReplace TRIGGER %If(%TriggerName) {%ProcedureOwner(.)%30TriggerName} %Else {%ProcedureOwner(.)t%1Action_%27TableName%TriggerSeq} AFTER %Action ON %TableOwner(.)%TableName REFERENCING OLD TABLE AS OLDTABLE NEW TABLE AS NEWTABLE FOR EACH ROW

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: UPDATE FOOTER
ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Template_Code: -- erwin Builtin Trigger ;

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: DELETE HEADER
ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Template_Code: %TeradataCreateReplace TRIGGER %If(%TriggerName) {%ProcedureOwner(.)%30TriggerName} %Else {%ProcedureOwner(.)t%1Action_%27TableName%TriggerSeq} AFTER %Action ON %TableOwner(.)%TableName REFERENCING OLD TABLE AS OLDTABLE FOR EACH ROW

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: DELETE FOOTER
ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Template_Code: -- erwin Builtin Trigger ;

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: INSERT HEADER
ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Template_Code: %TeradataCreateReplace TRIGGER %If(%TriggerName) {%ProcedureOwner(.)%30TriggerName} %Else {%ProcedureOwner(.)t%1Action_%27TableName%TriggerSeq} AFTER %Action ON %TableOwner(.)%TableName REFERENCING NEW TABLE AS NEWTABLE FOR EACH ROW

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: INSERT FOOTER
ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Template_Code: -- erwin Builtin Trigger ;

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: CUSTOM TRIGGER HEADER
ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Template_Code: %TeradataCreateReplace TRIGGER %ProcedureOwner(.)%TriggerName %Fire %Actions(" OR ") ON %TableOwner(.)%TableName %TriggerFireOrder %RefClause %Scope %TriggerWhen

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: CUSTOM TRIGGER DEFAULT BODY
PARENT UPDATE SET DEFAULT
PARENT DELETE SET DEFAULT
PARENT INSERT SET DEFAULT
CHILD INSERT SET DEFAULT
CHILD UPDATE SET DEFAULT
CHILD DELETE SET DEFAULT
CHILD DELETE SET NULL
PARENT INSERT SET NULL
PARENT INSERT CASCADE
PARENT UPDATE NO ACTION
CHILD UPDATE NO ACTION
PARENT DELETE NO ACTION
CHILD DELETE NO ACTION
CHILD INSERT NO ACTION
PARENT INSERT NO ACTION

ns2:Forward_Engineer_Options_Report.name: Select the options for DB Sync

ns2:Forward_Engineer_Options_ReportProps.ns2:Name: Select the options for DB Sync
